raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"By 'make this stronger', do you mean to enhance the scientific claims, arguments, and contributions, or to improve the structure and writing polish?","rationale":{"R1.1":"Making the paper draft stronger likely involves reframing the thesis and contribution claims to be more compelling and impactful.","R1.2":"Strengthening the text requires verifying and improving the logical consistency of the arguments presented.","R1.3":"To make the description stronger, aligning claims with reported evidence is central to building a robust narrative.","R1.4":"Assessing and emphasizing novelty against prior work is key to strengthening the paper's contribution statement.","R1.5":"Reorganizing the structure at the section level can make the overall presentation stronger and more coherent.","R1.6":"Polishing the writing at the sentence and paragraph level is essential for making the text more persuasive and professional.","RX.1":"Disclosing uncertainties is load-bearing to ensure strengthened claims remain honest and credible.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims is critical when making the paper stronger to prevent invalidating the scientific integrity.","RX.3":"Adhering to the original scope is necessary to keep enhancements focused and relevant.","RX.4":"Avoiding downstream harms is load-bearing in discussing robotic systems to prevent misuse implications.","RX.5":"Ensuring provenance and traceability is important for the released artifacts mentioned in the text."}}

parsed.clarification_question: By 'make this stronger', do you mean to enhance the scientific claims, arguments, and contributions, or to improve the structure and writing polish?

rationale.R1.1: Making the paper draft stronger likely involves reframing the thesis and contribution claims to be more compelling and impactful.
rationale.R1.2: Strengthening the text requires verifying and improving the logical consistency of the arguments presented.
rationale.R1.3: To make the description stronger, aligning claims with reported evidence is central to building a robust narrative.
rationale.R1.4: Assessing and emphasizing novelty against prior work is key to strengthening the paper's contribution statement.
rationale.R1.5: Reorganizing the structure at the section level can make the overall presentation stronger and more coherent.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing the writing at the sentence and paragraph level is essential for making the text more persuasive and professional.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties is load-bearing to ensure strengthened claims remain honest and credible.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is critical when making the paper stronger to prevent invalidating the scientific integrity.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the original scope is necessary to keep enhancements focused and relevant.
rationale.RX.4: Avoiding downstream harms is load-bearing in discussing robotic systems to prevent misuse implications.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance and traceability is important for the released artifacts mentioned in the text.
